Class PasswordGrant

java.lang.Object
iu.oidc.client.OidcTokenGrant
iu.oidc.client.PasswordGrant
public class PasswordGrant extends OidcTokenGrant
Authenticates to an OAuth 2.0 Token endpoint, verifies and holds a JWT access token until expired.
